Would you like to run the following command?
Environment: local
Reason: May I inspect load averages and disk usage?
$ printf 'load 32.26 17.10 13.06'; head -100; sensors 2>&1
› 1. Yes, proceed (y)
2. Yes, and don't ask again for commands with this prefix (p)
3. No, and tell Codex what to do differently (esc)
Press enter to confirm or esc to cancel
